entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a legume grown in over 50 countries

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The time to flowering, podding and maturity of a crop

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water held in the soil, affecting crop maturity

entities.name: TIME OF SOWING
entities.description: The date at which seeds are planted, influencing crop maturity

entities.name: LATITUDE
entities.description: The geographic coordinate that affects crop maturity

entities.name: ALTITUDE
entities.description: The height above sea level that affects crop maturity

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Lack of water availability that risks crop production

entities.name: TEMPERATURE EXTREMITIES
entities.description: Extreme high or low temperatures at the end of the season

entities.name: SOUTH AND SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: Region containing 73% of the global chickpea area

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Cropping system relying on rainfall rather than irrigation

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period following the rainy season when chickpea is grown

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT
entities.description: Drought occurring at the end of the growing season

entities.name: HEAT STRESSES
entities.description: Stress caused by high temperatures during the growing season

entities.name: EARLY PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The characteristic of reaching maturity quickly to escape environmental stresses

entities.name: AUTUMN-SOWN
entities.description: Crops planted during the autumn season

entities.name: MEDITERRANEAN-TYPE ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by Mediterranean climates

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: Country where early phenology is used to escape terminal drought

entities.name: SUMMER-GROWN
entities.description: Crops grown during the summer season

entities.name: TEMPERATE ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments with temperate climates

entities.name: FROST
entities.description: Freezing temperatures at the end of the season

entities.name: CANADA
entities.description: Country where early phenology is used to escape frost

entities.name: RICE-FALLOWS
entities.description: Land left fallow after rice cultivation, suitable for late sown chickpea

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where early phenology is needed for rice-fallows

entities.description: Efforts to develop improved chickpea cultivars with specific traits
